ddls:
CREATE TABLE "student_demographics" (
  "ethnicity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ethnicity record */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the students */,
  "class_size" INTEGER /* Total number of students in the class */,
  "graduated_high_school" INTEGER /* Number of students who graduated high school */,
  "enrolled_college" INTEGER /* Number of students enrolled in college */,
  "graduated_college" INTEGER /* Number of students who graduated from college */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the students */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the students */,
  "socioeconomic_status" TEXT /* Socioeconomic status of the students */,
  "first_generation_college_student" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the student is the first in their family to attend college */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the academic year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ethnicity_id", "year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ethnicities" (
  "ethnicity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ethnicity */,
  "ethnicity_name" TEXT /* Name of the ethnicity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ethnicity group */,
  "population_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the population that the ethnicity represents */,
  "geographic_distribution" TEXT /* Geographic distribution of the ethnicity (e.g., urban, rural) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ethnicity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "academic_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "ethnicity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ethnicity */,
  "graduation_rate_high_school" REAL /* Percentage of students graduating high school */,
  "college_enrollment_rate" REAL /* Percentage of students enrolled in college */,
  "college_graduation_rate" REAL /* Percentage of students graduating from college */,
  "average_gpa_high_school" REAL /* Average GPA of students in high school */,
  "average_gpa_college" REAL /* Average GPA of students in college */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the academic year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_academic_performance_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_academic_performance_ethnicity_id FOREIGN KEY ("ethnicity_id") REFERENCES ethnicities ("ethnicity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "college_enrollment_statistics" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record */,
  "ethnicity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ethnicity */,
  "total_enrolled" INTEGER /* Total number of students enrolled in college */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of enrollment data */,
  "enrollment_rate" REAL /* Rate of enrollment relative to high school graduates */,
  "college_name" TEXT /* Name of the college */,
  "program_of_study" TEXT /* Program of study */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the academic year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_college_enrollment_statistics_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_college_enrollment_statistics_ethnicity_id FOREIGN KEY ("ethnicity_id") REFERENCES ethnicities ("ethnicity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "high_school_graduation_statistics" (
  "hs_graduation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each high school graduation record */,
  "ethnicity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ethnicity */,
  "total_graduated" INTEGER /* Total number of students graduating high school */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of graduation data */,
  "graduation_rate" REAL /* Rate of high school graduation */,
  "high_school_name" TEXT /* Name of the high school */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the academic year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hs_graduation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_high_school_graduation_statistics_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_high_school_graduation_statistics_ethnicity_id FOREIGN KEY ("ethnicity_id") REFERENCES ethnicities ("ethnicity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "college_graduation_statistics" (
  "college_graduation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each college graduation record */,
  "ethnicity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ethnicity */,
  "total_graduated" INTEGER /* Total number of students graduating from college */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of graduation data */,
  "graduation_rate" REAL /* Rate of college graduation */,
  "college_name" TEXT /* Name of the college */,
  "program_of_study" TEXT /* Program of study */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the academic year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("college_graduation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_college_graduation_statistics_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_college_graduation_statistics_ethnicity_id FOREIGN KEY ("ethnicity_id") REFERENCES ethnicities ("ethnicity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the educational program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the program */,
  "year_evaluated" INTEGER /* Year the program was evaluated */,
  "impact_score" REAL /* Score indicating the program's impact on graduation rates */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the program */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Funding source of the program */,
  "impact_on_college_enrollment" REAL /* Score indicating the program's impact on college enrollment rates */,
  "impact_on_college_graduation" REAL /* Score indicating the program's impact on college graduation rates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_participation" (
  "participation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participation record */,
  "ethnicity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ethnicity */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the educational program */,
  "participants" INTEGER /* Number of participants in the program */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of participation */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the academic year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_participation_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_participation_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_participation_ethnicity_id FOREIGN KEY ("ethnicity_id") REFERENCES ethnicities ("ethnicity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_value" INTEGER /* Year value for tracking data over time */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester (e.g., Fall, Spring, Summer) */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the year is the current academic year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)
